applicabilityConditions: The executor supplies a valid QUIC version 1 Initial packet.
limitations: The existing coarse handshake check does not independently prove every condition that makes an Initial packet conforming.

applicabilityConditions: The negotiated QUIC version is version 1.
limitations: Handshake completion does not isolate or fully validate the TLS binding requirement.

notes: This mapping intentionally produces no directly validated requirement until check-level isolation and review exist.
